publicationstmt.publisher: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday August 13, 2025 at 22:04

did.unittitle: Tuberculosis pamphlets and ephemera

corpname.part: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

did.abstract: The collection includes pamphlets and ephemera regarding tuberculosis infection, treatment, and prevention in the United States and other countries. Materials in the collection were produced by United States federal and state agencies; international government agencies; domestic and international non-governmental organizations; conferences; and scholars of medicine, public health, and epidemiology.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Collection was created by Medical Historical Library staff from materials of unknown provenance and gifts of Bert Hansen, 2020 and 2021.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged in 5 series: Series I: United States, 1887-1963, undated. Series II: International, 1903-1964, undated. Series III: International conferences, 1906–1922. Series IV: Theses and dissertations, 1879–1936. Series V: Ephemera, 1902-1951, undated.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Tuberculosis pamphlets and ephemera. Historical Library, Harvey Cushing / John Hay Whitney Medical Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes pamphlets and ephemera regarding tuberculosis infection, treatment, and prevention in the United States and other countries. Materials in the collection were produced by United States federal and state agencies; international government agencies; domestic and international non-governmental organizations; conferences; and scholars of medicine, public health, and epidemiology.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

did.unittitle: United States
Government agencies
Federal Security Agency, Public Health Service, Tuberculosis . Health Information Series No. 33. Washington, D.C.: U.S. Government Printing Office, 1950.

United States Department of Health, Education and Welfare, Office of Vocational Rehabilitation, Opportunities for the tuberculous through vocational rehabilitation . Washington, D.C.: U.S. Government Printing Office, 1961.
United States Department of Health, Education and Welfare, Public Health Service, Tuberculosis in 1963: an overview . Washington, D.C.: U.S. Government Printing Office, 1963.

Veterans Administration, Department of Medicine and Surgery, Quarterly progress report of the Veterans Administration-Armed Forces study on the chemotherapy of tuberculosis . Vol. XV, No. 3. Washington, D.C.: 1960.
Congress

United States House of Representatives Bill 330 : A bill for an act to provide for the location, erection, organization, and management of a State sanatorium for persons afflicted with tuberculosis, making applicable thereto "An act to regulate the State charitable institutions and the State Reform School, and to improve their organization and increase their efficiency," approved April 15, 1875, and making an appropriation for the purpose of land, and the construction of the necessary buildings and the maintenance of the sanatorium . Washington, D.C., 1905.

Reynolds, J.B., Letter from the Acting Secretary of the Treasury, transmitting a copy of a communication from the Secretary of State submitting an estimate of appropriations amounting to $25,000 to enable this govenrment to participate suitably in the International Congress on Tuberculosis to convene in Washington in 1908 . Senate document no. 343. Washington, D.C., 1907.
United States Senate Bill 598 : A bill for an act to enable cities and villages to establish and maintain public tuberculosis sanitariums . Washington, D.C., 1908.

Clemenger, Frank J., F.C. Martley, Treatment of tuberculosis: animal experiments of active immunity by treatment with Von Ruck's vaccine against tuberculosis . Senate document no. 453. Washington, D.C.: U.S. Government Printing Office, 1916.

Lea, Luke, The Von Ruck treatment for tuberculosis. Remarks of Hon. Luke Lea of Tennessee in the Senate of the United States, Friday, September 8, 1916 . Washington, D.C.: U.S. Government Printing Office, 1916.
National Tuberculosis Association
National Tuberculosis Association, Health rules of the modern health crusaders . New York City, New York, 1918.
National Tuberculosis Association, Modern health crusaders manual for teachers, parents and others interested in work for children . New York City, New York,1918.
National Tuberculosis Association, Record of health chores based on the rules of modern health crusaders . New York City, New York, 1918.
National Tuberculosis Association, A year's work: nineteenth annual report of the Executive Office of the National Tuberculosis Association . New York City, New York, 1923.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a letter from Dr. Linsly R. Williams, Managing Director, addressed to "Members of the National Tuberculosis Association" dated September 28, 1923.

did.unittitle: National Tuberculosis Association, Ways and means to health education: material available through local tuberculosis associations . New York City, New York: Allied Printing, 1948.
National Tuberculosis Association, I had TB: stories from real life . 1950.
Other non-government national organizations
American Congress of Tuberculosis preliminary announcement. New York City, New York, 1901.
American Federation of Labor, Movement inaugurated and plan adopted by the American Federation of Labor to war on consumption . Washington, D.C.: Allied Printing, 1915.
California
San Francisco Tuberculosis Association, The war against tuberculosis in San Francisco . San Francisco, California, 1928.
Connecticut

Taylor, L.L. When a teacher bypasses his x-ray: one hundred per cent TB infection hits his classroom in Stark county . Reprinted from Ohio Tuberculosis and Health Magazine . Hartford, Connecticut: Connecticut Tuberculosis and Health Association, 1962.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Article from Ohio Tuberculosis and Health Magazine reprinted by Connecticut Tuberculosis and Health Association.

did.unittitle: Florida
Florida Tuberculosis and Respiratory Disease Association, Fifty golden years of service 1916-1966 annual report . The Miller Press, 1966.
Illinois

Chicago Tuberculosis Institute, Report of the eighth annual meeting of the Chicago Tuberculosis Institute, held January 29, 1914, at the City Club . Bulletin of the Chicago Tuberculosis Institute , series II, number 6. Chicago, Illinois, 1914.
Chicago Tuberculosis Institute, What the Chicago Tuberculosis Institute is doing . Chicago, Illinois, circa 1929.
Chicago Tuberculosis Institute, The Chicago Tuberculosis Institute . Chicago, Illinois, circa 1907.
Citizens' committee for the erection of a hospital for the treatment of consumptives newsletter. Chicago, Illinois.

Fisher, Irving, The modern crusade against consumption , publication of the Committee of One Hundred on National Health, no. 21. Chicago, Illinois: Illinois State Association for the Prevention of Tuberculosis, 1908.
Illinois State Board of Health, The cause, prevention, and cure of tuberculosis or consumption . Illinois, 1915.
Illinois State Board of Health, The cause, prevention, and cure of tuberculosis or consumption, eighth revised edition . Illinois, 1909.
Illinois State Board of Health, The cause, prevention, and cure of tuberculosis or consumption, sixth revised edition . Illinois, 1908.
Illinois State Board of Health, The cause, prevention, and cure of tuberculosis or consumption, third revised edition . Illinois, 1904.
Illinois Tuberculosis Association, "Modern Health Crusade chore folder"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Tri-fold brochure, "Form D-grade 6" includes list of daily chores with chart to record daily competion of chores for 8 weeks, weight record, the Crusader's Creed, and weight tables for height and age. Copy belonged to Emily Ramsey, eighth grade, Etter School, Monroe County. Hansen gift.

did.unittitle: Illinois Tuberculosis Association, "Modern Health Crusade chore folder"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Tri-fold brochure "Form C-12 weeks" issued by the National Tuberculosis Association, distributed by Illinois Tuberculosis Association. Includes list of daily chores with chart to record daily competion of chores for 8 weeks, weight record, the Crusader's Creed, and weight tables for height and age. Copy belonged to DeLoss Gentes, seventh grade, Johnson school, Livingston County. Hansen gift.

did.unittitle: Morgan County Medical Society, Committee on the Prevention of Tuberculosis, How to prevent and cure consumption . Chicago, Illinois: Allied Printing.
Ritter, John, Our diagnostic clinic preliminary--reporting the eight years of its activity . Chicago, Illinois, 1936.
Robinson, John A., "Letter to my dear doctor" and card to join the Illinois Society for the Prevention of Consumption. Chicago, Illinois, 1899.
Indiana

American Red Cross, Indiana Christmas Seal Committee, How to combat tuberculosis . American Red Cross Bulletin of the Indiana Christmas Seal Committee, Indiana Federation of Clubs Edition . Indianapolis, Indiana, circa 1911.
Indiana, Board of State Charities, Indiana tuberculosis laws hospital provision anti-tuberculosis societies . Indiana: Indiana Reformatory Print, 1917.
Indiana State Board of Health, Facts about tuberculosis . Indiana.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 8 health circular information sheets with an envelope

did.unittitle: Kentucky
Kentucky Board of Tuberculosis Commissioners, The home care of tuberculosis . Frankfort, Kentucky: The State Journal Company, 1915.
Maryland
The Laennec Society, Johns Hopkins Hospital, Preliminary programme for session of 1904 . Baltimore, Maryland, 1904.
Robert Garrett Free Hospitals for Children, The Robert Garrett Free Hospitals for Children 1910 . Baltimore, Maryland: Press of John S. Bridges & Co., 1910.
Maryland Association for the Prevention and Relief of Tuberculosis, First annual statement . Baltimore, Maryland, 1905.
Massachusetts

Boston Association for the Relief and Control of Tuberculosis, Protection of health from tuberculosis or consumption. Nature of the diseases and ways of preventing it. Principles of treatment . Boston, Massachusetts, 1909.
Boston Association for the Relief and Control of Tuberculosis, A war upon consumption: let us stamp out the disease from our city . Boston, Massachusetts, circa 1911.

City of Boston Consumptives' Hospital Department, General contract for the second ward building and corridors of Consumptives' Hospital, Mattapan, Boston . Boston, Massachusetts: City of Boston Printing Department, 1914.

City of Boston Consumptives' Hospital Department, Contract for plumbing work of domestic-administration building of Consumptives' Hospital, Mattapan, Boston . Boston, Massachusetts: City of Boston Printing Department, 1910.
City of Boston Consumptives' Hospital Department, Contract for refrigerating machinery for Consumptives' Hospital, Mattapan, Boston . Boston, Massachusetts: City of Boston Printing Department, 1911.
City of Boston Consumptives' Hospital Department, Contract for installing electric system for Children's Hospital, Mattapan, Mass . Boston, Massachusetts: City of Boston Printing Department, 1912.
City of Boston Consumptives' Hospital Department, General contract for Boston's Children's hospital at Mattapan, Boston . Boston, Massachusetts: City of Boston Printing Department, 1912.

City of Boston Consumptives' Hospital Department, Contract for electric wiring ward C and connecting corridor at Consumptives' Hospital, Mattapan, Mass . Boston, Massachusetts: City of Boston Printing Department, 1914.

City of Boston Consumptives' Hospital Department, Contract for heating addition men's cottage ward at Consumptives' Hospital, Mattapan, Mass . Boston, Massachusetts: City of Boston Printing Department, 1914.

City of Boston Consumptives' Hospital Department, Contract for plumbing addition men's cottage ward at Consumptives' Hospital, Mattapan, Mass . Boston, Massachusetts: City of Boston Printing Department, 1914.

City of Boston Consumptives' Hospital Department, General contract for building ward C and connecting corridor at Consumptives' Hospital, Mattapan, Mass . Boston, Massachusetts: City of Boston Printing Department, 1914.
Ludwig, Alfred O., Emotional factors in tuberculosis . Boston, Massachusetts: Massachusetts Society for Mental Hygiene and Massachusetts Department of Mental Health, 1918.
Massachusetts Board of Education, Tuberculosis and its prevention: suggestions to teachers . Boston, Massachusetts: Wright & Potter Co., 1908.
Mills, Hiram F., The suppression of tuberculosis . Boston, Massachusetts: The State Inspectors of Health of Massachusetts, 1913.
Shattuck, Frederick C., The past, present, and future of tuberculosis . Boston, Massachusetts, 1907.
Russell, Jas. B., On the prevention of tuberculosis . Boston, Massachusetts: Wright & Potter Printing Co., 1896.
Michigan
Board of Health and Poor Commissioners, Grand Rapids Michigan, Survey of five years work at tuberculosis sanatorium . Grand Rapids, Michigan, 1912.
Michigan State Board of Health, Restriction and prevention of consumption , ninth edition. Michigan, 1903.
Minnesota
Bracken, H.M., The tuberculosis problem in Minnesota , reprinted from The Journal-Lancet . 1917.
Minnesota Public Health Association, From whom? To whom? . Saint Paul, Minnesota.
Minnesota Public Health Association, What is the Mantoux test? . Saint Paul, Minnesota.
St. Paul Anti-Tuberculosis Committee, Efficiency and next needs of St. Paul's Health Department . St. Paul, Minnesota, 1913.
New Hampshire
New Hampshire Society for the Prevention of Consumption membership form. New Hampshire.
New Hampshire Society for the Prevention of Consumption, New Hampshire Society for the Prevention of Consumption articles of incorporation . New Hampshire, 1904.
New Jersey
McPaul, Rt. Rev. James A., Tuberculosis: its prevention and relief . Trenton, New Jersey: Trent Press, 1909.
New York
Howells & Stokes, Plans for a municipal sanatorium for consumptives . Charity Organization Society, Committee on the Prevention of Tuberculosis : New York City, New York, 1903.
Knopf, S. A., The duties of the individual and the government in the combat of tuberculosis . New York, 1903.
New York City, Department of Health, The registration and sanitary supervision of pulmonary tuberculosis in New York City , Monograph Series no.1. New York City, New York, 1912.
New York City Department of Health and the Committee on the Prevention of Tuberculosis of the Charity Organization Society, What you should know about tuberculosis . New York City, New York, 1910.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Book for use in "8A and 8B grades of elementary schools and in the high schools under the Department of Education of New York city." Hansen #5358.

did.unittitle: Krause, A. K., Studies from the Saranac Laboratory for the study of tuberculosis . Publication Office of the Journal of Medical Research: Boston, Massachusetts, circa 1916.
Saranac Lake Association of Private Sanatoria list. Saranac Lake, New York.
Syracuse, City of, Department of Public Safety Health Bureau, Information for consumptives and those living with them . Syracuse, New York.
Ohio

Ohio State Tuberculosis Commission, Report of the commission appointed to investigate the feasibility of erecting sanatoria for tuberculosis within the state of Ohio . Springfield, Ohio: Springfield Publishing Company, 1903.
Graydon, Dr. Thomas W., The Andral-Broca discovery for the cure of consumption, catarrh, bronchitis, asthma, etc. . Cincinnati, Ohio, circa 1887.
Graydon, Dr. Thomas W., Ten days' test medicines and full diagnosis of your case free. Diseases of the repiratory diseases . Cincinnati, Ohio.
Graydon, Dr. Thomas W., Question list and statement of case. Cincinnati, Ohio.
Withrow, Samuel P., Report of special survey of the Cincinnati Anti-Tuberculosis League . Cincinnati, Ohio, circa 1913.
Pennsylvania
Pennsylvania Society for the Prevention of Tuberculosis, How hotel keepers can aid in preventing the spread of tuberculosis , tract no. 3. Pennsylvania.
Pennsylvania Society for the Prevention of Tuberculosis, How to avoid contracting tuberculosis (consumption) , tract no.1. Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, 1901.
Pennsylvania Society for the Prevention of Tuberculosis, Registration of tuberculosis , tract no. 6. Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, 1901.
Puerto Rico
Ortiz, Pedro N., Report of the Commissioner of Health of Porto Rico for the fiscal year ending 1925 to the Governor of Porto Rico . San Juan, Porto Rico, 1926.
Rhode Island
Barnes, Harry Lee, Tuberculosis work in Rhode Island . Howard, Rhode Island: Howard Press, 1929.
"Home treatment for consumptives," class of the Central Congregational Church at the Outlet, March 18 to 23rd postcard. Rhode Island.
Rhode Island State Board of Health, A crusade against tuberculosis (consumption) for prevention and cure . Providence, Rhode Island, 1906.
Texas
Howe, G.L., Good health and how to keep it with addenda on tuberculosis and the state sanatorium . Texas: Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
Kinghorn, Hugh M. Rest and exercise in the treatment of pulmonary tuberculosis , pamphlet no. 18. Austin, Texas: Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, 1919.
Krause, Allen K., The larger field in tuberculosis , pamphlet no. 20. Austin, Texas: Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, 1920.
Krause, Allen K., Tuberculin: its nature and its effects on tuberculous animals, its action , pamphlet no. 22. Austin, Texas: Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, 1920.
Texas State Sanatorium, Avenues of infection in lung tuberculosis . Texas.
Quintanilla, Carlos J., Vias de entrada de la infeccion en la tuberculosis pulmonar . Texas: Texas State Sanatorium.
Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, The children's hospital . Texas.
Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, Facts and figures...pulmonary tuberculosis . Texas.
Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, Fundamentals of tuberculosis that everyone should know . Texas.
Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, Rehabilitation for the tuberculous . Texas.
Texas State Sanatorium, State Sanatorium . Texas.
Texas State Sanatorium, State Tuberculosis Sanatorium . Texas.
Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, State Tuberculosis Sanatorium . Texas.
Texas State Sanatorium, La tuberculosis . Texas.
Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, Tuberculosis: a social and economic problem affecting citizens of Texas . Texas.
Texas State Sanatorium, Tuberculosis as it affects children of school age in Texas . Texas.
Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, La tuberculosis: cómo debe ser entendido por todos los ciudadanos del estado de Texas . Texas.
Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, La tuberculosis: entre los Latino Americanos en Texas . Texas.
Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, La tuberculosis: entre los Mexicanos en Texas . Texas.
Hurtiz, Hildebrando R., Tuberculosis: sugestiones a las personas que comiezan el tratamiento . Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
McKnight, J.B., Tuberculosis: suggestions to persons beginning the treatment of tuberculosis . Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
Texas State Sanatorium, What every citizen in Texas should know about tuberculosis . Texas.
Texas State Sanatorium, What you should know about tuberculosis . Texas.

Waters, Bertram H., Andrew Peters, The results of sanatorium treatment of pulmonary tuberculosis with particular reference to the therapeutic use of tuberculin , pamphlet no. 16. Austin, Texas: Texas State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, 1919.
Chapman, John, The neglected epidemic: tuberculosis . Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
Chapman, John, The neglected epidemic: tuberculosis , fourth edition. Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
McKnight, J. B., Treating tuberculosis with artificial methods . Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
McKnight, J. B., Collapsing the lung in tuberculosis . Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
Potts, John. Lessons in tuberculosis for school children their teachers and their parents . Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
Potts, John. Lessons in tuberculosis for school children their teachers and their parents , sixth edition. Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
Potts, John. Lessons in tuberculosis for school children their teachers and their parents , eighth edition. Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
Potts, John. Lessons in tuberculosis for school children their teachers and their parents , tenth edition. Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
Potts, John. Lessons in tuberculosis for school children their teachers and their parents , eleventh edition. Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium.
Potts, John. Lessons in tuberculosis for school children their teachers and their parents , twelfth edition. Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, 1938.
Potts, John. Lessons in tuberculosis for school children their teachers and their parents , thirteenth edition. Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, 1939.
Potts, John. Lessons in tuberculosis for school children their teachers and their parents , fourteenth edition. Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, 1940.
Potts, John. Lessons in tuberculosis for school children their teachers and their parents , fifteenth edition. Texas: The Division of Correspondence State Tuberculosis Sanatorium, 1941.
Texas State Sanatorium School of Nursing, Be a trained tuberculosis nurse . Texas.
Vermont
Vermont State Tuberculosis Commission, Report of the Tuberculosis Commission of the state of Vermont to the General Assembly . Ludlow, Vermont: Tribune Print, 1906.
Vermont State Tuberculosis Commission, Report of the Tuberculosis Commission of the state of Vermont to the General Assembly . Rutland, Vermont: The Tuttle Company, 1904.
International
International Union Against Tuberculosis, Volunteers in Abidjan . Paris, France, 1964.
International Union Against Tuberculosis, The Misigssut's polar mission . Paris, France, 1964.
La Cruzada contra la Tuberculosis, Discursos pronunciados en el acto inaugural de la Cruzada contra la Tuberculosis . Buenos Aires, Argentina, 1935.
Department of Health, Canada, What you should know about tuberculosis . Ottawa, Canada, 1922.
Elliott, J.H., The present status of antituberculosis work in Canada--1908 . Ottawa, Canada: James Hope & Sons, 1909.
Canadian Association for the Prevention of Tuberculosis, Canadian agencies for the diagnosis and treatment of tuberculosis . Ottawa, Canada: Federal Department of Health.
Shanghai Anti-Tuberculosis Association, The birth of the Shanghai Anti-Tuberculosis Association . Shanghai, China.
Shanghai Anti-Tuberculosis Association, Address of the Chairman Dr. Sao-Ke Alfred Sze at the Annual Meeting of the Shanghai Anti-Tuberculosis Association . Shanghai, China, 1939.
Liga Contra la Tuberculosis, Revista de la liga contra la tuberculosis en Cuba . Habana, Cuba, 1916.
Joint Tuberculosis Council, Joint Tuberculosis Council post-graduate courses . Rickmansworth, England, 1934.
National Association for the Prevention of Tuberculosis, Tuberculosis in the Commonwealth: a brief outline . London, England, circa 1949.
National Association for the Prevention of Tuberculosis, The story of tuberculosis . London, England, 1947.
Re Union of Medical Societies, Report to council . London, England, 1906.
National Association for the Prevention of Tuberculosis, The second Commonwealth and Empire Health and Tuberculosis Conference . London, England, 1949.
National Association for the Prevention of Tuberculosis, Keeping an eye on your chest, annual report 1956-1957 . London, England, 1957.
Central Council for Health Education, Tuberculosis . London, England, 1941.
Freund, Dr. Jur. Richard, Prof. Dr. Gotthold Pannwitz, The campaign against tuberculosis in Germany and its relation to the compulsory insurance of working men . Berlin, Germany, circa 1907.
de Szendeffy, Alfred, The value of radioactive mentholated iodin (dioradin) in tuberculosis . 1911.
Canaperia, G. A., Etá e tubercolosi: riassunto della relazione e documentazione statistica . Torino, Italy, 1953.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letter from G. A. Canaperia to Yale Professor Ira M. Hiscock.

did.unittitle: Blood Transfusion Institute, The purports of speeches on the works published on the 24th March in the 15th year of Showa (1940) in Military Club at Kudan, Tokyo . Tokyo, Japan, 1940.
Goslinga, Jan, Die verschiedenen tuberkuloseformen. Groningen, the Netherlands.
Royal Netherlands Tuberculosis Association, Rehabilitation of the tuberculosis in the Netherlands . the Hague, the Netherlands.

Government of Northern Ireland, Ministry of Health and Local Government, Summary of health services accounts 1954-1955, part i. Northern Ireland General Health Services Board . Belfast, Northern Ireland, 1955.
Government of Northern Ireland, Ministry of Health and Local Government, Accounts on the Northern Ireland Tuberculosis Authority for the year ended March 31, 1955 . Belfast, Northern Ireland, 1955.
Swiss Society for Prehistory, Die XIV. hauptversammlung findet Sonntag, den 9. Juli 1922 in Olten statt . Bern and Solothurn, Switzerland, 1922.
Bernard, Léon, La prophylaxie de la tuberculose chez le nourrisson . Geneva, Switzerland, 1926.
International conferences
International Anti-Tuberculosis Association Conference, Vme Conférence internationale contra la tuberculose La Haye 6-8 Septembre 1906 . the Hague, the Netherlands, 1906.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Conference guide in French. Includes postcard in Dutch with names written on the reverse and postcard with map of the conference in French and English.

did.unittitle: Porter, Ira W., The International Congress on Tuberculosis, a report of the delegation from the National Fraternal Congress . Boston, Massachusetts, 1909.
International Congress on Tuberculosis, Program of the International Congress on Tuberculosis . Washington, D.C., 1908.
International Congress on Tuberculosis, Preliminary of the International Congress on Tuberculosis . Washington, D.C., 1908.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In Spanish, French, German, and English. Includes 2 letters and an envelope in English encouraging the recipient to attend the International Congress on Tuberculosis.

did.unittitle: International Congress on Tuberculosis, Preliminary of the International Congress on Tuberculosis, sixth edition . Washington, D.C., 1908.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In Spanish, French, German, and English.

did.unittitle: International Congress on Tuberculosis, Preliminary of the International Congress on Tuberculosis, seventh edition . Washington, D.C., 1908.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In Spanish, French, German, and English. Includes 1 letter with an envelope in English encouraging the recipient to attend the International Congress on Tuberculosis and a card to request active membership in the International Congress on Tuberculosis.

did.unittitle: International Congress on Tuberculosis, Preliminary announcement of the International Congress on Tuberculosis, eighth edition . Washington, D.C., 1908.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In Spanish, French, German, and English.

did.unittitle: International Congress on Tuberculosis, Preliminary of the International Congress on Tuberculosis, ninth edition . Washington, D.C., 1908.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In Spanish, French, German, and English.

did.unittitle: Countess of Aberdeen, Report of the work of the Women's National Health Association of Ireland as it bears on tuberculosis and with special reference to its itinerant tuberculosis exhibition submitted by the Countess of Aberdeen, President, as part of the report from Ireland to the Tuberculosis International Congress, at Washington, 1908 . Dublin, Ireland, 1908.

Straus, Nathan, Report by Nathan Straus official delegate on the part of the United States by appointment of the president on progress made in America in the prevention of tuberculosis submitted to the seventh International Congress Against Tuberculosis . Rome, Italy, 1912.
Union Internationale Contre la Tuberculose, Troisième conférence, rapport sur l'activité des Associations Nationales des différents pays dans la lutte antituberculeuse . Bruxelles, Belgium, 1922.

Olmsted, Catherine, René Sand, Union Internationale Contre la Tuberculose troisième conférence internationale, La prophylaxie antituberculeuse dans les familles et l'intervention des infirmières visiteuses . Bruxelles, Belgium, 1922.
Kidner, I.B., Union Internationale Contre la Tuberculose troisième conférence internationale, travail des tuberculeux avant et après la cure . Bruxelles, Belgium, 1922.
Hewat, Fergus, Union Internationale Contre la Tuberculose troisième conférence internationale, la lutte contra la tuberculose à l'âge scolaire . Bruxelles, Belgium, 1922.
Debré, Robert, Union Internationale Contre la Tuberculose troisième conférence internationale, la prophylaxie de la tuberculose à l'âge scolaire . Bruxelles, Belgium, 1922.
Theses and dissertations
Miqueu-Ray, Léopold, Contribution à l'étude phtise pulmonaire dans l'inde ancienne d'après L'Ayurveda de Suçruta . Paris, France: Imprimeries de la faculté de médecine, 1905.
Frinault, André, Des dystrophies osseuses dans la tuberculose articulaire de l'enfant . Paris, France, 1908.
Jousset, Xavier, Transmission de la tuberculose dans les rapports sociaux . Paris, France, 1908.
Trastour, Octave, L'adénie infectieuse ses rapports avec la tuberculose ganglionnaire . Montpellier, France, 1908.
Cointet, M. Lepel, De la valeur curative des inhalations et des pulvérisations dans les maladies du poumon et bronches . Paris, France, 1909.
Jonet, Joseph-Marie-Marcel-Didier, Contribution a l'étude de la guérsion spontanee de la tuberculose rénale . Bordeaux, France, 1909.
Regnard, Henri, Les tuberculino-réactions dans la tuberculose ganglio-pulmonaire des enfants . Paris, France, 1909.
Valdeiron, Albert, L'isolement des tuberculeux dans les hopitaux . Montpellier, France, 1909.
Vinit, Alexandre, Contribution a l'étude de la marétine dans le traitment des pyrexies tuberculeuses . Paris, France, 1909.
Jarmon, Paul, L'ionisation mécanique de l'eau et l'interversion du saccharose . Toulouse, France, 1919.
Goeller, Rudolf, Cauistischer beitrag sur lehre von der tuberculose . Berlin, Germany, 1879.
Hadeler, R., Lungenembolie speziell nach operationen . München, Germany, 1904.
von Riekhoff, Arnold, Über den zusammenhang von asthma und lungenödem . München, Germany, 1904.
Weiss, Richard, Ueber metastatische abscesse im gehirn bei diffused eitringer bronchitis und brochopneumonie . München, Germany, 1904.
Berger, Armand, Über körpergewichtsveränderungen der patienten der baseler heilstätte für lungenkranke in Davos . Leipzig, Germany, 1905.
Goetze, Eduard, Seltene komplikationen bei tuberkulöser wirbelcaries mit bildung einer oesophago-trachealfistel . München, Germany, 1905.
Kiolemenoglou, Basilius, Ein fall von bronchiektasie . München, Germany, 1905.
Kühn, Hermann, Cystericerkus cellulosae in den lungen . Leipzig, Germany, 1905.
Mosheim, Karl, Die heilungsaussichten der lungentuberkulose bei spontanem und künstlichem pneumothorax . Marburg, 1905.
Rockenbach, Franz, Über die entstehungs- und verbreitungsweise der tuberkulose in dem Badischen orte Walldorf . Marburg, Germany, 1905
Anstett, Nikolaus, Ueber akuten verschluss eines hauptbronchus durch einen fremdkörper und ätiologie des bronchialatmens bei pneumonie . München, Germany, 1906.
Eisenberg, Carl, Über die entstehung von pneumonien nach operationen, insbesondere nach Laparatomien . Berlin, Germany, 1906.
Burghardt, Karl, Chronische veränderungen der hundelunge . Berlin, Germany, 1907.
Voigt, Carl, Die peritonitis tuberculosa und ihre behandlung . Halle, Germany, 1907.
Pechowitsch, Gersch, Resultate der operativen behandlung der bauch-felltuberkulose . Berlin, Germany, 1908.
Wetzell, Friedrich, Beiträge zur perkutanen tuberkulinreaktion nach moro . Würzburg, Germany, 1908.
Geilinger, Hans, Experimenteller beitrag zur chemischen desinfektion des tuberkelbazillenhaltigen sputums . München, Germany, 1909.
de Greek, Carl, Über die verbreitung der tuberkulose in der stadt Posen in den jahren 1901-1908 mit besonderer berücksichtigung der wohnungsfrage . Jena, Germany, 1910.
Lippert, Ernst, Experimentelle studien über das verhalten der blutgase bei erkrankungen der lunge und der luftführenden wege . Würzburg, Germany, 1912.
von Czarnowski, Stefan, Beitrag zur symptomatologie und pathologie der tuberkulösen meningitis . Keil, Germany, 1912.
Voss, Heinrich, Zur pathologie der peritonitis tuberculosa . Würzburg, Germany, 1912.
Goldschmidt, Berthold, Beiträge zur chemischen desinfektion des tuberkulösen sputums . Breslau, Poland, 1910.
Gawantka, Friedrich, Über das vorkommen von tuberkelbazillen im strömenden blut . Breslau, Poland, 1913.
Sandoz, Charles, Untersuchungen über die bedeutung des sternalwinkels bei lungentuberkulose . Bern, Switzerland, 1907.
Goldsteain, Mlle. Bas-Cheva, Note sur une réaction colorée des sécretions de la peau dans la tuberculose pulmonaire . Genève, Switzerland, 1913.
Weiss, Emil, The complement fixation test in tuberculosis . Chicago, Illinois, 1936.
Ephemera
"Fight tuberculosis, buy Christmas seals" table top display

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Features Santa Claus holding a poster, folds to become small stand up display. Hansen gift.

did.unittitle: Koch Inhalation Tuberculine bottle label

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "By Dr. Edward Koch. From the Laboratories of the German Koch Installation Company...New York." Hansen gift

did.unittitle: National Tuberculosis Association/American Red Cross "Modern Health Crusader 1917-1918" pin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Red, green, and white image includes a Christmas tree with Red Cross shield. Hansen gift.

did.unittitle: National Tuberculosis Association "Modern Health Crusader 1920" pin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cabochon shaped pin with red, white, and blue image of knight holding shield and sword, made by American Arts Work, Coshocton, Ohio. Hansen gift

did.unittitle: National Tuberculosis Association "Modern Health Crusader 1920" coin pin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Front has knight on a horse, reverse reads "National Tuberculosis assn. New York," pin back is missing. Hansen gift

did.unittitle: National Tuberculosis Association "Modern Health Crusader K" pin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Multicolor image of knight on a horse holding lance with a castle in the background. Made by Bastian Brothers Company, Rochester, New York. 2 copies. Hansen gift.

did.unittitle: National Tuberculosis Association "Modern Health Crusader K.B." pin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Multicolor image of jousting knight on a horse made by Bastian Brothers Company, Rochester, New York. Hansen gift.

did.unittitle: National Tuberculosis Association "Modern Health Crusader Squire" pin

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Multicolor image of a medieval sqire with a horse, lance, and shield made by Bastian Brothers Company, Rochester, New York. Hansen gift.

did.unittitle: Symptoms of tuberculosis lists

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of two different lists, origin unknown.

did.unittitle: Trades Union Anti-Tuberculosis Association, "Easter greetings" stamps

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Block of four connected stamps with red, green, and white image of a milkman pouring a glass of milk for a child laying in bed who is holding a rabbit. Hansen gift.

did.unittitle: Willey, Day Allen, Evelyn Mae Hart, Francis S. Kinder, Charles H. Johnson, New hope for consumptives . American Monthly Reviews of Reviews, circa 1902.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes multiple articles on treatment of tuberculosis in Pennsylvania, Colorado, and New York. Hansen #2889
